docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARRETT, MICHAEL D.D.S, A PROFESSIONAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT GENUNG, MICHAEL SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-11-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-21-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-11-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-11-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-02-1993, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-02-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ALSO CONT'D FOR ANOTHER STATUS CONFERENCE ON 8/31/93. PLTF. TO GIVE NOTICE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-31-1993 CONTINUED FROM JUN-02-1993 TO AUG-31-1993 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF PARRETT, MICHAEL D.D.S, A PROFESSIONAL CORP.
OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-31-1993, OFF CALENDAR CASE TRANSFERED TO SMALL CLAIMS IN OPEN COURT 8/31/93. PLAINTIFF TO FILE ORDER PER TRANSFER.
ADDED TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DISMISSAL CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-28-1996, DISMISSAL
